items.title: Get busy living: Why standing still is more dangerous than you think
items.summary: "Get busy living, or get busy dying." - Stephen King, Rita Hayworth and Shawshank Redemption It's one of those lines that outgrew its source material.

items.title: Mulling ban, EU gets expert verdict on social media for children
items.summary: EU Chief Ursula von der Leyen tasked the panel of experts to come up with advice backed by evidence on how the 27-nation bloc should protect minors from harmful content
